body: {"rationale":"Four criteria fail: (1) Root cause is missing a concrete file:line reference — the description names cli/go.mod but cites no specific Go source path:line for any offending ModelRef or --model-ref call site; a cold agent must search from scratch rather than opening a named location. (2) AC is missing the mandatory `lefthook run pre-commit passes` gate as a final criterion; the rubric requires it explicitly. (3) No `phase:N` label is present; the rubric requires it in every bead. (4) Parent and dependencies are not stated at all — even a bare 'Parent: none. Deps: none.' is required. Four criteria pass: title is imperative and names subsystem + change clearly; AC is numbered and includes a `-run` regex filter satisfying the test-name requirement; AC1 provides a wired-in `rg` assertion with exact flags; description includes an explicit non-scope section and contains no /tmp references or chat-session citations.","score":4,"suggested_fixes":["Run `rg -n 'ModelRef|model-ref|--model-ref' cli --glob '*.go'` before filing and inline the top 2-3 offending file:line pairs into the description's ROOT CAUSE section.","Append a fourth AC item: `4. lefthook run pre-commit passes.`","Add a `phase:N` label (e.g. `phase:4` for an iterate-phase cleanup bead).","Add an explicit parent/deps line to the description — e.g. 'Parent: none. Deps: none.' or cite the parent epic bead ID."],"waivers_applied":[]}
